invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破1950（基于ATR 41.4964和支撑位）或融资费率转正超过0.03%（显示多头拥挤），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 1950 (based on ATR 41.4964 and support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.03% (indicating long crowding).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破78（基于ATR 1.5171和支撑位）或融资费率转正超过0.02%（空头平仓结束），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 78 (based on ATR 1.5171 and support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.02% (short covering ends).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.092（基于ATR 0.0015和支撑位）或融资费率转正超过0.01%（空头平仓结束），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 0.092 (based on ATR 0.0015 and support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.01% (short covering ends).
